page_content: AREC431 Agricultural Water Quality: Policy and Legal Issues (3 Credits) An overview of the American and Maryland legal systems and sources of legal information as it pertains to water quality and agriculture. Prerequisite: AREC326; or ECON326; or students who have taken courses with comparable content may contact the department. Credit Only Granted for: AREC489L or AREC431. Formerly: AREC489L.
